message:
fix(db,server): timestamp migration rollback safety, reconstruct recipients_json, cleanup Cx documentation

Migration (mcp-agent-mail-db):
- Fix convert_all_timestamps to rollback the open transaction before
  propagating detect_column_format errors, preventing the connection
  from being left in a dirty transaction state on failure
- Restructure if-let chain into match expression for clearer error vs
  skip vs proceed control flow

Reconstruct (mcp-agent-mail-db):
- Make discover_messages return DbResult<()> so unrecoverable DB failures
  (dead connection, disk full) propagate instead of being silently counted
  as parse_errors — probe connection health after insert failure to
  distinguish recoverable parse errors from fatal DB errors
- Populate recipients_json column during message reconstruction with
  structured to/cc/bcc arrays, fixing blank recipients in databases
  rebuilt from archive .md files
- Add test assertions verifying recipients_json roundtrip (to=["Bob"],
  cc=[], bcc=["Carol"])

Cleanup worker (mcp-agent-mail-server):
- Document why Cx::for_testing() with Budget::INFINITE is correct for
  the cleanup worker: it runs on a dedicated OS thread with no parent Cx,
  and should never be cancelled by budget exhaustion

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
